title: Ubiquiti UACC-Lock-Strike-Safe-15mm, Electric fail-safe lock
description: The Ubiquiti UACC-Lock-Strike-Safe-15mm is an electric strike lock that connects to a UniFi Access Hub . The lock is fail-safe, unlocking in the event of failure . It can be installed in wooden, steel, and aluminum frames. Holding force of up to 1200 kg . Power is supplied via a two-wire terminal block 12V/400mA UA-Hub-Door UA-Hub-Door-Mini UA-Hub-Gate EAH-8 UA-Ultra
specsSearch: Power Power type DC terminal Max. power consumption [W] 4,8 Power via connector/terminal 12V DC
